do local W=string.len local P=e local j=string.char local U=math.floor local end return(function(e,j,U,i,E,o,D,Y,u,t,z,g,R,L,p,n,M,P,C,l,Q,m)Y,l,t,P,M,Q,u,n,z,g,C,R,L,p,m=function(e,W)local j=m(W)local U=function(U)return P(e,{U},W,j)end return U end,function(e,W)local P(e,{U;i;E},W,j)end return U end,function(e,W)local j=m(W)local U=function(U,i,E,o,D)return P(e,{U,i;E;o,D},W,j)end return U end,function(e)L[e]=L[e]-(107902-107901)if L[e]==-772139+772139 then
